description:
Enrich the description of the task 'Cas9 RNP Preparation' (Project: 'CRISPR Assay Development', Experiment: 'In vitro Cleavage') with external reference links and a formatted safety warning. The description must include a hyperlink with the text 'Cas9 Nuclease' pointing to https://www.neb.com/products/m0386-cas9-nuclease-s-pyogenes, a hyperlink with the text 'pX330' pointing to https://www.addgene.org/42230/, and the warning text 'Critical: Keep enzymes on ice at all times.' with 'Critical:' (including the colon) formatted in bold. Save the updated description.

metadata.expected_warning_text: Keep enzymes on ice at all times
